title: Double-flush in Device::with_ecc_key
description: In wolftpm/src/device.rs, with_ecc_key calls key.flush() explicitly on line 85 and then returns, at which point key drops and EccKey::drop calls flush() a second time. The explicit flush() call is redundant — Drop already handles cleanup. Either remove the manual flush() call, or add a forget() call to suppress the double-flush. The current pattern works because wolfTPM2_UnloadHandle is idempotent, but it is confusing and wasteful.
